titleStmt.title: SII 7.383: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 383. (A.R. No. 178 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē nama[ḥ .*] śrīsarasvatyayē namaḥ śrīgurubhyō na
ma[ḥ .*] namastuṁgaśisastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . treyilōkyanagarāra
ṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . sālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1336 saṁ
du Ēḷaneya va¨rttamāna jayasaṁvatsarada bēsagetiṁgaḷu modalāgi
mācāseṭṭiya baḷiya dēUruseṭṭiyarū śrīpaṁcaliṁgadēvara saṁnidhi
yalū maṭhavanu kaṭṭi Ā maṭhada dha¨r(ṁ)mmake biṭṭa bāḷa catussīmeya vivara
bra(ṁ)hmavaravoḷage paḍuvabhāgiyalli mukumera kaṭṭina bāḷu tānū ba
da brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷa gaḍi mūḍalu hariva sāliṁda paḍu
valu teṁkalu bastiya mekkeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu bastiya bā
ḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ dēUruseṭiya gaḍiyiṁ teṁkaṇagaḍi baḍagalu bastiya bāḷa
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyavoḷagaṇa bāḷu bittuva bedegaṇagilu
nāghaṁḍugadalū gade muḍi yippatū Alli gadeya gaḍi muḍalu bastiya bāḷiṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gaṇapatidēvara maṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu ya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kōṭiyakēriya halara gaḍiyi
ṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya voḷagaṇa bāḷa bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍu
gadalu gade muḍi 2 bittu hāne kaḍame hoḷeya baḷiya gadaya catussīmeya vi
vara mūḍalu kōṭiyakēriya halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu Appālara gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hosabiṇaseṭṭiyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
hariva sāliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷagaṇa bāḷu bittuva bedegaṇagi
lu nāghaṁḍugadalu gade muḍi 2 . Aṁtu gade muḍi 1 mūvattu hāne gadege salu
va gēṇi nāghaṁḍugadalu nāḍa muḍi 65 yī bāḷa mēle Uḷa bhūmige naḍava dēva
svatōṭa voṁdakkeAkki naḍa muḍi 5 salidu mattu Aṟuvattu muḍe Aki maṭha basti
voḷage baḍagakaṭṭina gaṇajeyalli hāyakamuppaya duggaṇasāvaṁtana huṭu ya bāḷa
Oḷage kaṭṭina bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu tirumāḷuvana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu siriŪra hāyakana baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hā
yakana baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu cauṁḍārahāyakana baḷiyavara hoḷe
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya voḷagaṇa bāḷu bittuva bedegeṇagilu nāghaṁḍu
gadalu gaddemuḍi 7 yidake gēṇi Aki nāḍa muḍi 20 yī bāḷige kaṭuteṟu siriŪ
ra hāyakana baḷiyavarige kāla 1 dē kāṭi hoṁnu 1 Aramanaya teṟu siriŪra
sēnabōvana hadi kāṭi hoṁnu 2 yi bāḷige Āruvāra mūla gade 1 koṭa pa
ya hoṁnu 428 mattaṁ Alli haṁguḷa baḷiya keṁṇāṁtana huṭṭu
Āruvārada bāḷu koṇikala gadeya gaḍiya vivara mūḍalu caṁdana guḍiyiṁda pa
ḍuvalu teṁkalu siriŪra hāyakana baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu ma
ttaṁ Avara gaḍiyida mūḍalu baḍagalu haṁguḷa baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁ muḍalu
yiṁtī catussīmeya voḷagaṇa gade bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu muḍi 600 .
Digital edition of SII 7.383 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
